collectionTargets.title: HOUSE EXTERIOR
collectionTargets.notes: Prioritize a whitewashed rural house with a dark pitched roof and enough front-facing clarity to support the final FPV recognition.

collectionTargets.title: INTERIOR ROOM
collectionTargets.notes: Should reinforce modest peasant-house realism, not museum nostalgia.

collectionTargets.title: WOMAN WARDROBE
collectionTargets.notes: Focus on authentic folk textures and aged fabrics; avoid costume-pageant styling.

collectionTargets.title: SOLDIER PORTRAIT / UNIFORM
collectionTargets.notes: The portrait and battlefield look need a shared face shape and non-glamorous military styling.

collectionTargets.title: FPV APPROACH FEEL
collectionTargets.notes: Use only for motion logic; do not import HUD overlays, timestamps, or interface graphics into prompts.
